MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DANA CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

Appearances:
Michelle Clowser of Brydon Hugo & Parker (808.0300) for defendant and moving party
Ron Archer of Brayton Purcell (898.1555) for plaintiff and responding party

This matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied. Defendant failed to shift the burden of producing evidence for defendant failed to demonstrate that plaintiff is unable to prove its case, rather, the record reflects that plaintiff may have difficulty doing so given that not all Victor products contained asbestos. The Court grants the motion as to the false representation and punitive damages. The burden shifted and plaintiff has not presented evidence of a triable issue of fact. Order signed in open Court.
